Package mocka.orm.generator

Class EntityGeneratorInitializer

java.lang.Object
mocka.orm.generator.EntityGeneratorInitializer
@Component public class EntityGeneratorInitializer extends Object
EntityGeneratorInitializer is responsible for discovering ORM-managed entity classes at application startup and registering corresponding EntityGenerator instances.

During initialization, this component:

  1. Loads entity classes managed by each ORM
  2. Creates EntityGenerator instances per entity class
  3. Registers them into EntityGeneratorFactory

This class does not participate in entity generation at runtime. Its sole responsibility is bootstrap-time discovery and registration.

  • Method Details

    • init

      @PostConstruct public void init()
      Initializes and registers entity generators after the Spring context has been fully constructed.

      This method scans all resolved ORMCreators, loads the entity classes they manage, and creates a corresponding EntityGenerator for each.

      public ORMResolver getOrmSelector()
